feature_name: Refactor word lists and add clap-driven 'things' categories

tasks.title: Convert src/words.rs to src/words/ directory module and replace ADJECTIVES
tasks.description: Delete src/words.rs. Create src/words/mod.rs that declares submodules and re-exports constants. Create src/words/adjectives.rs with the new curated ADJECTIVES list (~400 entries, user-provided). Temporarily keep NOUNS available by creating src/words/objects.rs with the current NOUNS entries re-exported as both OBJECTS and NOUNS (so existing code compiles). Update mod.rs re-exports accordingly. All existing tests must still pass after this task.
tasks.definition_of_done: src/words/ directory exists with mod.rs, adjectives.rs, objects.rs. ADJECTIVES contains ~400 user-provided entries. NOUNS still exported for backward compat. cargo test passes. cargo clippy passes. cargo fmt passes.

tasks.title: Add ThingCategory enum, --things CLI arg, and update generate_name signature
tasks.description: In src/main.rs: add ThingCategory enum (Objects, Produce, Animals) deriving clap::ValueEnum with doc comments. Add nouns() method on ThingCategory that returns the noun slice. Add 'things: ThingCategory' field to Cli struct with default Objects. Change generate_name to accept nouns: &[&str] parameter. Update main() to resolve cli.things.nouns() and pass it. Remove the NOUNS import (use ThingCategory::nouns() instead). Remove backward-compat NOUNS re-export from words/mod.rs. Update existing unit tests in src/main.rs to pass a noun slice to generate_name.
tasks.definition_of_done: ThingCategory enum exists with ValueEnum derive. --things arg on Cli with default Objects. generate_name accepts nouns slice. Existing tests updated and passing. cargo clippy and cargo fmt pass.

tasks.title: Add produce and animals word lists
tasks.description: Create src/words/produce.rs with the user-provided PRODUCE list (~200 entries). Create src/words/animals.rs with the user-provided ANIMALS list (~250 entries). Register both submodules in src/words/mod.rs and add re-exports. The user will provide the exact word lists for both files.
tasks.definition_of_done: PRODUCE and ANIMALS constants exist and are accessible via words::PRODUCE and words::ANIMALS. ThingCategory::nouns() correctly resolves Produce and Animals variants. cargo build succeeds.

tasks.title: Replace objects word list with user-provided curated list
tasks.description: Replace the contents of src/words/objects.rs with the user-provided OBJECTS list (~240 entries). Remove any leftover NOUNS re-export if still present. The user will provide the exact word list.
tasks.definition_of_done: OBJECTS contains ~240 user-provided entries. No NOUNS constant exists anywhere. cargo build succeeds.

tasks.title: Update unit tests for new word list structure
tasks.description: In src/main.rs tests: (1) Remove word_lists_contain_exactly_777_entries_each test. (2) Update word_list_entries_are_non_empty_lowercase_ascii_alphabetic to cover all four lists (ADJECTIVES, OBJECTS, PRODUCE, ANIMALS). (3) Update word_lists_have_no_duplicates_and_no_cross_list_overlap to check all four lists internally and verify no word appears in both adjectives and any noun category. (4) Add range-based size assertion tests: ADJECTIVES 350-500, OBJECTS 200-300, PRODUCE 150-250, ANIMALS 200-300.
tasks.definition_of_done: Exact-count test removed. All four lists validated for format, duplicates, cross-list overlap, and size ranges. cargo test passes.

tasks.title: Add integration tests for --things flag
tasks.description: In tests/cli.rs: (1) Test --things objects produces output (default behavior). (2) Test --things produce produces output. (3) Test --things animals produces output. (4) Test --things invalid exits non-zero. (5) Test --help mentions --things with accepted values. (6) Add combination tests: --things produce --lower --delimiter - (and at least one combo per category).
tasks.definition_of_done: All new integration tests pass. Each category tested standalone and in combination with --lower/--delimiter. Invalid value test confirms non-zero exit. --help test confirms --things is documented.

tasks.title: Update README and docs
tasks.description: Update README.md usage examples to show --things flag with each category. Update docs/ARCHITECTURE.md to reflect the new words/ directory module structure and ThingCategory enum. Update docs/RELIABILITY.md to reference category-specific noun lists instead of single NOUNS array.
tasks.definition_of_done: README shows --things usage. ARCHITECTURE.md reflects new module structure. RELIABILITY.md references updated correctly. npx markdownlint-cli2 passes on all changed files.

history.note: Feature initiated: Refactor word lists (new curated adjectives ~400, objects ~240), add clap-driven 'things' argument with categories (objects, produce, animals), remove exact word-count tests.
Moved to discovery. PM to gather requirements and write exec plan.
PM completed Discovery. Exec plan written to docs/exec-plans/active/2026-04-07-refactor-word-lists-things-categories.md.
Moved to design. PE to produce technical design in exec plan.
Moved to tasks. EM broke design into 7 discrete implementation tasks.
Implementation started. Task 1: Convert src/words.rs to src/words/ directory module and replace ADJECTIVES.
Task 1 completed. words/ module created with adjectives.rs (316 entries) and objects.rs (backward-compat NOUNS export). All quality gates passing.
Task 2 started: Add ThingCategory enum, --things CLI arg, and update generate_name signature.
